subject: Fw: As discussed by Mr. Leeds and Mr. Epstein
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 12, 2007 2:56:29 PM
Subject: FW: As discussed by Mr. Leeds and Mr. Epstein


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Brigid McCarthy [mailto:brigid.mccarthy@leedsequity.com]

To: Lesley Groff
Subject: As discussed by Mr. Leeds and Mr. Epstein


 
 
Brigid McCarthy
Leeds Equity Partners, LLC
350 Park Avenue, 23rd Floor
New York, NY   10022
212-835-2004 
212-835-2020 (fax)
